diagramConstraints.description: Use top-to-bottom (TD) direction as the primary flow direction
Each node must have a descriptive label that clearly states its purpose or action
Use diamond shapes for decision/conditional nodes with yes/no or true/false labels on edges
Include explicit start and end terminal nodes using rounded rectangles

formattingRules.description: Group related steps into labeled subgraphs when the flowchart has more than 8 nodes
